CustomField.description: A text copy of the For the Calendar Year field, used to remove unnecessary comma from year display (shows 2,011 as 2011). This field allows you to see the most recent year of any income source record. Tip: Use this field to identify current applicants that have outdated income information.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
This field allows you to see the most recent year of any income source record.
Tip: Use this field to identify current applicants that have outdated income information.
CustomField.label: Most Recent Income Year
